Grand Rama Bistro

Restro & Cafe

"Where Great Food Meets Great Memories"

About Us

Welcome to Grand Rama Bistro Restro & Cafe, where culinary excellence meets warm hospitality. Our restaurant is a premier destination for food lovers seeking an unforgettable dining experience.

Fresh Ingredients

Sourced daily from trusted suppliers for maximum freshness and quality

Expert Chefs

Highly trained culinary professionals with years of international experience

Comfortable Ambiance

Elegant and luxurious dining space designed for your comfort

Quality Service

Attentive staff dedicated to exceeding your expectations

Family-Friendly

Perfect destination for family gatherings and celebrations

Our Menu

Marinated cottage cheese cubes grilled to perfection with aromatic spices

₹250

Spring Rolls

Crispy rolls filled with fresh vegetables and served with sweet chili sauce

₹180

Butter Chicken

Tender chicken in rich tomato and cream sauce with aromatic spices

₹320

Biryani

Fragrant basmati rice cooked with meat and traditional Indian spices

₹350

Chow Mein

Stir-fried noodles with vegetables and your choice of protein

₹220

Fried Rice

Perfectly cooked rice stir-fried with vegetables, eggs, and soy sauce

₹200

Tandoori Chicken Burger

Spiced chicken patty with fresh vegetables and special sauce

₹150

Cheese Margherita Pizza

Classic pizza with fresh mozzarella, basil, and tomato sauce

₹280

Espresso

Strong and aromatic coffee served hot or iced

₹80

Cappuccino

Smooth coffee with steamed milk and foam

₹120

Gulab Jamun

Soft milk solids dumplings in sugar syrup

₹100

Chocolate Lava Cake

Warm chocolate cake with molten center and ice cream

₹180

Masala Chai

What Our Guests Say

Verified Guest

"Excellent food quality and outstanding service. The ambiance is perfect for a romantic dinner. Highly recommended!"

Priya Singh

Verified Guest

"Best dining experience in the city! Fresh ingredients, skilled chefs, and impeccable service. Worth every penny!"

Amit Patel

Verified Guest

"Perfect place to celebrate special occasions. The staff is attentive and the food is absolutely delicious!"

Neha Gupta

Verified Guest

"Family-friendly environment with diverse menu options. Kids loved the food, and we had a wonderful time!"

AI-Powered Services

Experience the future of dining with our intelligent features

Food Recommendation Assistant

Our AI analyzes your preferences and suggests dishes tailored to your taste. Get personalized recommendations based on dietary preferences, past orders, and cuisine preferences.

AI Customer Support

24/7 intelligent chatbot support ready to answer your questions about menu, reservations, delivery status, and more. Instant responses to your queries anytime!

Smart Reservation Assistant

AI-powered booking system that suggests the best times, tables, and special offers based on your preferences and availability. Seamless reservation experience!
